pricing: beraSTONE/ETH via RedStone Classic price feed, scaled by 1e28 to Morpho 1e36 format, with WETH treated 1:1 to ETH.
notes: MorphoChainlinkOracleV2 with a single BASE_FEED_1 (beraSTONE_FUNDAMENTAL RedStone feed, 8 decimals). No vaults, no secondary feeds, no quote feeds — simplest possible configuration. RedStone is pull-based (relayer-dependent), unlike native Chainlink push feeds. Feed data ~12h old at check; no redundancy if RedStone relayer stops. Immutable contract (no proxy). beraSTONE is a bridged Berachain LST — bridge risk sits outside the oracle.
